testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_creation_responds_under_3_seconds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:43: in test_enhanced_treat_creation_responds_under_3_seconds assert response.status_code in [200, 429], f"Expected 200 or 429, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 or 429, got 500: {"detail":"Error creating enhanced treat: 429: {'message': \"Window limit reached! You've created 4/4 treats in the last 6 hours. Wait for reset or get an extra life!\", 'daily_status': {'treats_in_window': 4, 'treats_today': 4, 'window_limit': 4, 'daily_limit': 16, 'window_hours': 6, 'remaining_in_window': 0, 'remaining_daily': 12, 'remaining_treats': 0, 'can_create_treat': False, 'time_until_reset_seconds': 21517, 'extra_treats_balance': 0, 'streak': {'current_streak': 1, 'longest_streak': 1, 'last_play_date': '2026-02-27T01:49:23.773000', 'streak_active': True}, 'streak_bonus': {'bonus_treats': 0, 'xp_multiplier': 1.0, 'brewing_reduction': 0, 'title': 'New Chef', 'streak_days': 1}, 'treats_created_today': 4, 'base_limit': 4, 'total_limit': 16}}"} E assert 500 in [200, 429] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_treat_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:61: in test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_treat_field assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_outcome_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:82: in test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_outcome_field assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:148: in test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_message assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rate_limiting_works

failure.message: AssertionError: Got unexpected status code: 500 assert 500 in [200, 429, 400]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:309: in test_rate_limiting_works assert code in valid_codes, f"Got unexpected status code: {code}" E AssertionError: Got unexpected status code: 500 E assert 500 in [200, 429, 400]
